KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.description: Normalized output from one KMA APIHub structured operation.
KmaApiHubStructuredOutput.title: KmaApiHubStructuredOutput

data_type.description: Response format requested from KMA APIHub. XML is the official sample/default; JSON may be used only when the operation supports it. Official parameter name: dataType. Operation: CloudSatlitInfoService/getGk2aclaArea.
data_type.title: Data Type

date_time.description: KMA satellite/radar observation datetime, YYYYMMDDHHMM. Use a recent KST observation; APIHub returns an error outside the current 2 days window for these satellite products. Official parameter name: dateTime. Operation: CloudSatlitInfoService/getGk2aclaArea.
date_time.title: Date Time

dong_code.description: Administrative area code for area-scoped KMA products. Use only for Area operations, not All operations. Official parameter name: dongCode. Operation: CloudSatlitInfoService/getGk2aclaArea.
dong_code.title: Dong Code

num_of_rows.description: Number of rows to return. Use the default unless more rows are needed. Official parameter name: numOfRows. Operation: CloudSatlitInfoService/getGk2aclaArea.
num_of_rows.title: Num Of Rows

page_no.description: Page number, 1-based. Use the default unless the citizen asks for another page. Official parameter name: pageNo. Operation: CloudSatlitInfoService/getGk2aclaArea.
page_no.title: Page No

result_type.description: KMA product/result code for this satellite, radar, or model product. Keep the catalog default unless the citizen names a product code. Official parameter name: resultType. Operation: CloudSatlitInfoService/getGk2aclaArea.
result_type.title: Result Type
